VAL-AUTH-004.title: Successful login with valid phone credentials
VAL-AUTH-004.observation: Clicked Phone tab on login page. Form label changed to 'Phone Number' with 'Enter your phone number' placeholder. Entered phone number 1234567890 and password password123, clicked Login. User was authenticated and redirected to home page (http://localhost:3100/) showing Goods tab with bottom navigation (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My).

steps.observed: Login form displayed with Email tab active
Form label changed to 'Phone Number', placeholder changed to 'Enter your phone number'
Redirected to http://localhost:3100/ (Goods home page with bottom tabs)

VAL-AUTH-011.title: Logged-in user accessing login redirects away
VAL-AUTH-011.observation: While logged in from phone login test, navigated directly to http://localhost:3100/login. The page initially loaded at /login but was immediately redirected to http://localhost:3100/ (home page). Login form was not rendered; Goods home page with bottom tabs was displayed instead.

steps.observed: Redirected to http://localhost:3100/ - Goods home page displayed, login form not rendered

VAL-AUTH-012.title: Logout clears session and redirects
VAL-AUTH-012.observation: Navigated to My tab, found and clicked 'Log out' button. User was redirected to /login page. Then navigated to protected route /my - was redirected to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fmy, confirming session was fully cleared and auth gate is enforced.

steps.expected: My Profile page with Log out button
steps.observed: My Profile page displayed with 'Log out' button visible
Redirected to http://localhost:3100/login with login form displayed

VAL-AUTH-012.consoleErrors: Pre-existing 'Invalid or unexpected token' error present on all pages - not related to logout flow

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-AUTH-004 (phone login) works correctly with redirect to home. VAL-AUTH-011 (authenticated user redirect from /login) redirects to home page as expected. VAL-AUTH-012 (logout) clears session and redirects to login, with protected routes properly gated.
